title: Crane's MTR Escalator
description: This resource pack overhauls MTR mod's escalator texture to look brighter.
body: Personally I'm strongly sensitive to the art style of different mods. In the MTR mod community it seems that reality comes first, but a 256x train looks out of place with the 16x blocks. Fortunately, I can choose the train packs, and for some other textures, I can do it myself. So here comes CME, where escalators get a brighter texture, with more solid pixel boarders.
